stem:
Consider the following circuit composed of XOR gates and non-inverting buffers. The non-inverting buffers have delays delta_1 = 2ns and delta_2 = 4ns as shown in the figure. Both XOR gates and all wires have zero delays. Assume that all gate inputs, outputs, and wires are stable at logic level 0 at time 0. If the following waveform is applied at input A, how many transitions (change of logic levels) occur(s) at B during the interval from 0 to 10 ns?

Circuit: Input A feeds into a buffer (delay delta_1 = 2ns) producing signal A1, and also feeds into a buffer (delay delta_2 = 4ns) producing A2. A XOR gate computes A XOR A1, whose output feeds into another XOR gate along with A2, producing final output B.

Waveform at A: A=0 from 0 to 5ns, A=1 from 5ns to 10ns (a single rising edge at t=5ns).
